error.message: The data reader is incompatible with the specified 'hs3MVCMTQa2Model.role'. A member of the type, 'id', does not have a corresponding column in the data reader with the same name.
error.detail: System.Data.Entity.Core.EntityCommandExecutionException: The data reader is incompatible with the specified 'hs3MVCMTQa2Model.role'.
